Level_1_Needs_work: No credible PaymentMethod abstraction; checkout riddled with type switches.
Level_2_Getting_there: Interface present but callers still depend on concrete types or large branching.
Level_3_Acceptable: Clean contract; checkout depends on abstraction; minimal branching at call sites.
Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus elegant extensibility: new rail needs new class + wiring, not Order edits.

Level_4_Outstanding: Level 3 plus robust handling of failure/edge paths aligned with stated contract.
